page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Online CG Hokan Keikaku
text:
is an anthology artbook collecting artwork created using CG. It was published by Media Works on 10 June 2001. It was bundled with a CD-ROM with extra illustrations not featured in the book. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4840218501 

Overview

Officially approved by GAINAX! The first "Evangelion" online CG anthology, featuring over 800 images!
★Includes a CD-ROM featuring 156 artists and over 800 CG images.

The boom of Neon Genesis Evangelion which became a social phenomenon, coincided with the rise of the internet, when anyone could easily create CG on a computer. This book features Evangelion drawings by over 150 professional, semi-professional, and amateur CG artists, all in one place, along with a CD-ROM!

The CD-ROM includes works that could not be included in the book, as well as high-resolution illustrations.

Table of Contents

Original CG illustration p.04
CG illustrated stories and manga p.20
CG drawing course p.33
Illustration collection by character p 40
Featured illustrations by theme p.60
Author introductions p.81
Other CD-ROM titles p.121
How to use the CD-ROM and the software included p.126

Staff

Cover illustrated by Nakayama Masaru

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4840218501
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4840218504
